description: Default catalog intentionally contains one narrow seed case for platform development only; broader suite balancing is a later corpus milestone.

cases.title: DoubleTreeMap platform seed
cases.summary: Single-file seed case pinned to clean Chartsy history for early catalog/provide/grade/run development.
cases.dominantIntent: Keep a narrow, behavior-preserving refactor target around a primitive double-key tree map utility.

suiteClaims.note: This is a platform development seed case only and does not claim to be the final balanced v1 suite.

lineage.historyNote: Pinned clean snapshot from the charting-engine replacement history.

prioritization.rationale: Narrow single-file case that lets early platform work exercise cataloging and workspace preparation without pretending the full suite is curated.
